subject: Exclusive Job Opportunity: Remote Senior Manager — $185,000/year + Benefits
body:
Dear Candidate,

Your professional profile on LinkedIn caught the attention of our recruitment team. We are reaching out on behalf of a Fortune 500 client who is urgently seeking a Senior Operations Manager for a fully remote position.

Position: Senior Operations Manager (Remote)
Salary: $185,000 - $210,000/year
Benefits: Full medical/dental, 401(k) matching, 30 days PTO, signing bonus
Start Date: Immediate
Location: 100% Remote — Work from anywhere

Key Requirements:
- 3+ years of experience in any management role
- Basic computer skills
- Available to start within 2 weeks

This is an exclusive opportunity that is not posted publicly. Due to the urgency of the hire, our client has authorized an accelerated interview process — just a brief phone screen and you could receive an offer within 48 hours.

To proceed, please complete our preliminary assessment form:
https://global-careers-network.com/apply/senior-manager

You will need to provide:
- Resume or LinkedIn profile URL
- Full legal name and address
- Date of birth and SSN (for background check authorization)
- Copy of driver's license
- Bank details for payroll setup

Only 3 candidates are being considered for this role. Please respond within 24 hours to secure your interview slot.

Best regards,

Jennifer Walsh
Senior Recruiter
Global Careers Network
Phone: (555) 891-2340
LinkedIn: linkedin.com/company/global-careers-network
